TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-lovestory-zheng
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: 'a pan to n'a e eng ehohomo.
S.PHON: ʔs psn to nʔs e eŋ ehohomo.
S.FORM: 'a pan to n'a e eng ehohomo.
S.PHON: ʔs psn to nʔs e eŋ ehohomo.
S.TRANSL: 有一個 講的故事.

TRANSL.notes: There is (a story I will) tell.

S.TRANSL: There is tell.

S.FORM: ne noana'o pan to cihi ci 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ne nosnsʔo psn to ʦihi ʦi ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: ne noana'o pan to cihi ci 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ne nosnsʔo psn to ʦihi ʦi ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 很久以前有一個男孩子.
Long time ago, there was a boy.

S.FORM: ahoi ne moso n'a oko la pan to lasi noepohi ci maezo oko no mamespingi ta mo cono hosa.
S.PHON: shoi ne moso nʔs oko ɗs psn to ɗssi noepohi ʦi msezo oko no msmespiŋi ts mo ʦono hoss.
S.FORM: ahoi ne moso n'a oko la pan to lasi noepohi ci maezo oko no mamespingi ta mo cono hosa.
S.PHON: shoi ne moso nʔs oko ɗs psn to ɗssi noepohi ʦi msezo oko no msmespiŋi ts mo ʦono hoss.
S.TRANSL: 從他小時候,有一個女孩子在村子裡一直跟他一起.
Since his childhood, there has been a girl whom he gets together with in the village.

S.FORM: 'e mamespingi la kaebʉ ho la ah mʉm'ʉ to hana.
S.PHON: ʔe msmespiŋi ɗs kseɓɨ ho ɗs sh mɨmʔɨ to hsns.
S.FORM: 'e mamespingi la kaebʉ ho la ah mʉm'ʉ to hana.
S.PHON: ʔe msmespiŋi ɗs kseɓɨ ho ɗs sh mɨmʔɨ to hsns.
S.TRANSL: 那女孩,當她種花時,他覺得快樂.
The girl, when she grows flowers, she feels happy.

S.FORM: ko'ko lasi akoeva no ucia ah paemʉhi to peongʉcngʉci to ucia 'e isi 'e mo 'e cono hosa.
S.PHON: koʔko ɗssi skoevs no uʦis sh psemɨhi to peoŋɨʦŋɨʦi to uʦis ʔe isi ʔe mo ʔe ʦono hoss.
S.FORM: ko'ko lasi akoeva no ucia ah paemʉhi to peongʉcngʉci to ucia 'e isi 'e mo 'e cono hosa.
S.PHON: koʔko ɗssi skoevs no uʦis sh psemɨhi to peoŋɨʦŋɨʦi to uʦis ʔe isi ʔe mo ʔe ʦono hoss.
S.TRANSL: 因此,她想在村子裡到處種滿花.

TRANSL.notes: Therefore, she intends to grow (flowers) everywhere all over the whole village.

S.TRANSL: Therefore, she intends to grow everywhere all over the whole village.

S.FORM: mohcu la maica ah sasngoyʉskʉ 'o oko no hahocngʉ ho mamespingi.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs msiʦs sh sssŋojɨskɨ ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: mohcu la maica ah sasngoyʉskʉ 'o oko no hahocngʉ ho mamespingi.
S.PHON: mohʦu ɗs msiʦs sh sssŋojɨskɨ ʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ ho msmespiŋi.

TRANSL.notes: (後來)就這樣,男孩和女孩長大了.

S.TRANSL: 就這樣,男孩和女孩長大了.

TRANSL.notes: (Then,) just like this, the boy and the girl grew up.

S.TRANSL: just like this, the boy and the girl grew up.

S.FORM: 'iama tesi ʉmnʉa ta hahocngʉ 'e oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms tesi ɨmnɨs ts hshoʦŋɨ ʔe oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: 'iama tesi ʉmnʉa ta hahocngʉ 'e oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms tesi ɨmnɨs ts hshoʦŋɨ ʔe oko no msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 竟然男孩喜歡上了女孩.
Unexpectedly, the boy loved the girl.

S.FORM: moso i'nʉskʉ yuyuso uh to hcue'u ho ho eoyaso.
S.PHON: moso iʔnɨskɨ jujuso uh to hʦueʔu ho ho eojsso.
S.FORM: moso i'nʉskʉ yuyuso uh to hcue'u ho ho eoyaso.
S.PHON: moso iʔnɨskɨ jujuso uh to hʦueʔu ho ho eojsso.
S.TRANSL: 有一次他們兩個一起去山上玩.
One time, they two walked together to the hill and played.

S.FORM: 'e 'oko no hahocngʉ la pahpasunaeno ho micu maica tibkocʉ to con ci hana to lasi ʉmnʉa to mamespingi ci hana.
S.PHON: ʔe ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ ɗs pshpssunseno ho miʦu msiʦs tiɓkoʦɨ to ʦon ʦi hsns to ɗssi ɨmnɨs to msmespiŋi ʦi hsns.
S.FORM: 'e 'oko no hahocngʉ la pahpasunaeno ho micu maica tibkocʉ to con ci hana to lasi ʉmnʉa to mamespingi ci hana.
S.PHON: ʔe ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ ɗs pshpssunseno ho miʦu msiʦs tiɓkoʦɨ to ʦon ʦi hsns to ɗssi ɨmnɨs to msmespiŋi ʦi hsns.
S.TRANSL: 男孩唱歌,並且摘了一朵花,一朵那女孩喜歡的花.
The boy sang and picked one flower, the flower that the girl liked.

S.FORM: 'ia mo pahpasunaeno to isi ʉmnʉa to mamespingi ci na 'ici pasunaenva ho tipkocʉ to lasi ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi ci hana.
S.PHON: ʔis mo pshpssunseno to isi ɨmnɨs to msmespiŋi ʦi ns ʔiʦi pssunsenvs ho tipkoʦɨ to ɗssi ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi ʦi hsns.
S.FORM: 'ia mo pahpasunaeno to isi ʉmnʉa to mamespingi ci na 'ici pasunaenva ho tipkocʉ to lasi ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi ci hana.
S.PHON: ʔis mo pshpssunseno to isi ɨmnɨs to msmespiŋi ʦi ns ʔiʦi pssunsenvs ho tipkoʦɨ to ɗssi ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi ʦi hsns.
S.TRANSL: 他唱了一首女孩喜歡的歌,摘了一朵女孩喜歡的花.

TRANSL.notes: (He) sang a song which was loved by the girl, and picked a flower which was loved by the girl.

S.TRANSL: sang a song which was loved by the girl, and picked a flower which was loved by the girl.

S.FORM: tesi akoeva no faeni ta mamespingi ho nte ako akoyu no m'ea ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi.
S.PHON: tesi skoevs no fseni ts msmespiŋi ho nte sko skoju no mʔes ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: tesi akoeva no faeni ta mamespingi ho nte ako akoyu no m'ea ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi.
S.PHON: tesi skoevs no fseni ts msmespiŋi ho nte sko skoju no mʔes ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi.

TRANSL.notes: 他想要把(花)給女孩,希望女孩喜歡他.

S.TRANSL: 他想要把 給女孩,希望女孩喜歡他.

TRANSL.notes: He would intend to give (it) to the girl, and would intend to ask for the girl's love.

S.TRANSL: He would intend to give to the girl, and would intend to ask for the girl's love.

S.FORM: iama nemio pan to isi aiti ci mo cihi ci 'oko no mamespingi mo eon to aaskiti to c'oeha ho seolʉa no mongsi.
S.PHON: isms nemio psn to isi siti ʦi mo ʦihi ʦi ʔoko no msmespiŋi mo eon to ssskiti to ʦʔoehs ho seoɗɨs no moŋsi.
S.FORM: iama nemio pan to isi aiti ci mo cihi ci 'oko no mamespingi mo eon to aaskiti to c'oeha ho seolʉa no mongsi.
S.PHON: isms nemio psn to isi siti ʦi mo ʦihi ʦi ʔoko no msmespiŋi mo eon to ssskiti to ʦʔoehs ho seoɗɨs no moŋsi.
S.TRANSL: 突然,這時候看到一個女孩在河邊哭.
Unexpectedly, at that time, a girl was seen crying beside the river.

S.FORM: isi cu usa ta hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu uss ts hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: isi cu usa ta hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isi ʦu uss ts hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 這男孩走過去 .
The boy goes to .

S.FORM: 'iama moso tufku 'e mo mongsi ci mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms moso tufku ʔe mo moŋsi ʦi msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: 'iama moso tufku 'e mo mongsi ci mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔisms moso tufku ʔe mo moŋsi ʦi msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 原來那女孩本來在洗衣服.

TRANSL.notes: (he found out that) The girl who cried was (originally) washing clothes.

S.TRANSL: The girl who cried was washing clothes.

S.FORM: mo ngohcu 'o coni to isi tufkua ci i'ihosa.
S.PHON: mo ŋohʦu ʔo ʦoni to isi tufkus ʦi iʔihoss.
S.FORM: mo ngohcu 'o coni to isi tufkua ci i'ihosa.
S.PHON: mo ŋohʦu ʔo ʦoni to isi tufkus ʦi iʔihoss.
S.TRANSL: 一件衣服漂走了.
One of the clothes which are washed drifted away.

S.FORM: 'e mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ tesi akoeva no ah ah ea akoeva no yʉsʉ ho te meesi ho hucma.
S.PHON: ʔe mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ tesi skoevs no sh sh es skoevs no jɨsɨ ho te meesi ho huʦms.
S.FORM: 'e mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ tesi akoeva no ah ah ea akoeva no yʉsʉ ho te meesi ho hucma.
S.PHON: ʔe mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ tesi skoevs no sh sh es skoevs no jɨsɨ ho te meesi ho huʦms.
S.TRANSL: 我想要在明天的祭典穿那件漂走的衣服.
I would like to wear the dress which drifted away when we hold the ceremony tomorrow.

S.FORM: 'e hahocngʉ isi cu to'usni ho eaa 'e mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ ho eoveineni ta oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔe hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu toʔusni ho ess ʔe mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ ho eoveineni ts oko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: 'e hahocngʉ isi cu to'usni ho eaa 'e mo ngohcu ci yʉsʉ ho eoveineni ta oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: ʔe hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu toʔusni ho ess ʔe mo ŋohʦu ʦi jɨsɨ ho eoveineni ts oko no msmespiŋi.

TRANSL.notes: 那男孩幫助(那女孩)拿回漂走的衣服,並且還給了那女孩.

S.TRANSL: 那男孩幫助 拿回漂走的衣服,並且還給了那女孩.

TRANSL.notes: The boy helped (the girl) and got the clothes drifting away, and gave (it) back to the girl.

S.TRANSL: The boy helped and got the clothes drifting away, and gave back to the girl.

S.FORM: 'e mamespingi isi aiti ho isi to 'e mo to'unu ci hahocngʉ to'unu maeo ta yʉsʉsi.
S.PHON: ʔe msmespiŋi isi siti ho isi to ʔe mo toʔunu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ toʔunu mseo ts jɨsɨsi.
S.FORM: 'e mamespingi isi aiti ho isi to 'e mo to'unu ci hahocngʉ to'unu maeo ta yʉsʉsi.
S.PHON: ʔe msmespiŋi isi siti ho isi to ʔe mo toʔunu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ toʔunu mseo ts jɨsɨsi.
S.TRANSL: 就看到...來幫助的男孩幫忙拿她的衣服.
It's seen ... The boy who helped got her clothes.

S.FORM: iama tesi na'no ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi tan'e 'e 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isms tesi nsʔno ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi tsnʔe ʔe ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: iama tesi na'no ʉmnʉa ta mamespingi tan'e 'e 'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: isms tesi nsʔno ɨmnɨs ts msmespiŋi tsnʔe ʔe ʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 出其不意的那女孩非常喜歡這個男孩.
Unexpectedly, the girl liked this boy very much.

S.FORM: at'inghi 'e hahocngʉ o'a s'a 'e mo uhm tufku 'o isi ʉmnʉa ci ah mamespingi.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi ʔe hshoʦŋɨ oʔs sʔs ʔe mo uhm tufku ʔo isi ɨmnɨs ʦi sh msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: at'inghi 'e hahocngʉ o'a s'a 'e mo uhm tufku 'o isi ʉmnʉa ci ah mamespingi.
S.PHON: stʔiŋhi ʔe hshoʦŋɨ oʔs sʔs ʔe mo uhm tufku ʔo isi ɨmnɨs ʦi sh msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 但是對那個男孩而言,洗衣服的那個女孩不是他喜歡的.
But, as for the boy, the one who washes clothes is not the girl whom is loved by him.

S.FORM: 'a i'o mo mʉm'ʉ to hana 'o isi a'ʉmta ʉmnʉa.
S.PHON: ʔs iʔo mo mɨmʔɨ to hsns ʔo isi sʔɨmts ɨmnɨs.
S.FORM: 'a i'o mo mʉm'ʉ to hana 'o isi a'ʉmta ʉmnʉa.
S.PHON: ʔs iʔo mo mɨmʔɨ to hsns ʔo isi sʔɨmts ɨmnɨs.
S.TRANSL: 男孩喜歡的那個是種花的.
The one whom the boy liked was the one who growed flowers.

S.FORM: ko'ko o'a isi tiova na 'e to'tohngʉ ta mo so tufku ci m'ea ʉmnʉa ci 'oko no mamespingi 'o to'tohngʉsi.
S.PHON: koʔko oʔs isi tiovs ns ʔe toʔtohŋɨ ts mo so tufku ʦi mʔes ɨmnɨs ʦi ʔoko no msmespiŋi ʔo toʔtohŋɨsi.
S.FORM: ko'ko o'a isi tiova na 'e to'tohngʉ ta mo so tufku ci m'ea ʉmnʉa ci 'oko no mamespingi 'o to'tohngʉsi.
S.PHON: koʔko oʔs isi tiovs ns ʔe toʔtohŋɨ ts mo so tufku ʦi mʔes ɨmnɨs ʦi ʔoko no msmespiŋi ʔo toʔtohŋɨsi.
S.TRANSL: 因此他沒有接受那個洗衣服,並且希望他喜歡的那個女孩的想法.
Therefore, he didn't accept the thought of the girl who washed clothes and who asked for love.

S.FORM: te'o cu c'o ec'ʉha tan'e.
S.PHON: teʔo ʦu ʦʔo eʦʔɨhs tsnʔe.
S.FORM: te'o cu c'o ec'ʉha tan'e.
S.PHON: teʔo ʦu ʦʔo eʦʔɨhs tsnʔe.
S.TRANSL: 我就說到這裡.
I just stop here.
